standard_terms.dispute_resolution: Binding arbitration in New York, NY

risky_clauses: Automatic multi-year renewal without opt-out window
Non-compete clause prevents switching vendors for 12+ months
Vendor retains ownership of all customizations
Penalty for using competing services during contract period
Data deletion within 30 days of termination with no export support
Price escalation clause tied to unspecified index
Unilateral contract modification rights for the vendor
Liability cap set below expected project value
safe_clauses: Full data export available at any time
Price locked for the duration of the contract
Annual performance review with SLA credits
Right to audit vendor security practices
Clear intellectual property ownership by the buyer
Disaster recovery and business continuity guarantees
